title: SOMEWHERE
content:
Runrig - Somewhere  (C & R MacDonald) 2016 From the Album "The Story"
 
 
 
     [Intro]
G    G    G    G
 
 
     [Verse 1]
G                       Em
Somewhere on the arc of ages
       C        D
We are born, we cry
G                       Em
On this spinning orb of wonder
    C       D
We live, we die
Em                     Bm
Still the moon and the stars will shine
   C                   D
When we've both had our time
 
 
     [Chorus]
G                C          D
Somewhere in the dark I'll find you
G                C           D        Em
Somewhere in the light, I'll meet you there
Bm                    C
Where immortal souls collide
D              G
Somewhere out there
 
 
      [Verse 2]
G                        Em      Bm
Can't bear to leave this path of years
         C            Am   D
And the joys that it unfolds
G                     Em       Bm
Can all this just be ground to dust
      C                 Am    D
Without meaning, resolve, untold
Em           G                 C
This love is gold, can't let it go
      G         D
It's for all of time
 
 
     [Chorus]
G                 C               D
Somewhere in the dark I'll find you
G                 C           D       Em
Somewhere in the light, I'll meet you there
Bm                   C
Where immortal souls collide
D              G
Somewhere out there
Em            Bm
Somewhere out there
 
 
     [Middle Eight]
G                  Em
On the arc of ages,On this orb of wonder
G                          Em
Where the light is growing,Where the sun goes under
G                  Em
On the arc of ages,On this orb of wonder
G                          Em
Where the light is growing,Where the sun goes under
 
 
     [Music Break]
C   G   C   G   G    G Bm  Bm  Bm   C   C
 
Em           G                  C
This love is gold, can't let it go
      G         D
It's for all of time
 
 
    [Chorus]
G                 C               D  Dsus4
Somewhere in the dark I'll find you
G                 C           D       Em
Somewhere in the light, I'll meet you there
Bm                   C      D
Where immortal souls collide
G                 C               D  Dsus4
Somewhere in the dark I'll find you
G                 C           D       Em
Somewhere in the light, I'll meet you there
G                 C               D  Dsus4
Somewhere in the dark I'll find you
G                 C           D       G
Somewhere in the light, I'll meet you Somewhere
 
Bm              G       C
Somewhere 
Em            Bm
Somewhere out there
 
 
     [Fade Out]
D              G
Somewhere 
Em            Bm      G    C   G  C   G
Somewhere 
 
 
Mark W

X
